. Site Maintenance






The New Mexico Department of Workforce Solutions Will Be Back Soon


Our website and online systems are temporarily unavailable while we complete a system upgrade and transition to a secure cloud-based system. We apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your patience.

In-person services will reopen on Monday, June 1, 2026, including the Unemployment Insurance Operations Center (1-877-664-6984) and Americaâs Job Center New Mexico locations.
